summary: Auth defects plus a missing token expiry.

findings.title: SQL injection via string concatenation
findings.body: The query concatenates username into SQL, enabling injection.

findings.title: Hard-coded secret
findings.body: JWT_SECRET is hard-coded in the source file.
findings.recommendation: Move the secret to configuration/secret storage.

findings.title: Plaintext password equality check
findings.body: Password compared with == in plain text rather than a hashed, constant-time comparison.

findings.title: JWT issued without expiry
findings.body: jwt.sign is called without expiresIn, so issued tokens never expire — a session-management risk.
findings.recommendation: Set expiresIn and validate it on verify.
